description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.11-slim-bullseye Docker image (always pulled) with a before_script that runs ./entrypoint.sh, adds $HOME/.local/bin to PATH, and sets PIP_INSTALL_OPTS="--root-user-action=ignore". Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes `make -e pre-commit test`, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master and main. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `make -e pre-commit build`, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master or main branches.
